creator: antoine@FreeBSD.org
text:
Those 2 syntax *never* worked:


emacs>=23.3:${PORTSDIR}/editors/emacs-nox11 \

The package is named emacs-nox11,  not emacs


textproc/markdown-mode.el:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/markdown-mode.el \

The port doesn't install any executable named textproc/markdown-mode.el
